title: Savory Turkish Steak Doner Kebab
description: A funky and chewy Turkish dish featuring fillet of steak, this dairy-free-friendly doner kebab is perfect for a quick and energizing meal.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet or doner kebab machine to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced steak to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in the preheated skillet and cook the steak for 5 minutes per side, or until it reaches 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Transfer the cooked steak to a cutting board and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the rested steak into thin strips.
In the same skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil and cook the sliced onion for 5 minutes, or until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Warm the pita bread slices by wrapping them in foil and heating them in the oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 5 minutes.
Assemble the doner kebab by spreading a layer of onion and garlic on each pita bread slice, followed by a few slices of steak, some diced tomato, and a sprinkle of shredded lettuce.
